delegatedBy.description: Clarify WHAT a phase delivers with ambiguity scoring; produces a SPEC.md before discuss-phase.

turns.content: Clarify WHAT a phase delivers with ambiguity scoring; produces a SPEC.md before discuss-phase.

## SPEC COMPLETE

**Plan:** SR-05 — Config & Governance Cluster Unification
**Ambiguity:** 0.10 (gate: ≤ 0.20) ✅
**Requirements:** 5 locked (REQ-01 through REQ-05)
**Acceptance Criteria:** 10 pass/fail (SR05-AC-01 through SR05-AC-10)

**Artifact:**
- `.planning/phases/SR-05-config-governance-cluster-unification-2026-06-04/SR-05-SPEC.md`

**Coverage Audit:**

| Source | ID | Description | Covered By | Status |
|--------|-----|-------------|------------|--------|
| GOAL | SR-05 goal | Unify config/governance cluster | REQ-01, REQ-04 | ✅ |
| GOAL | SR-05 goal | Populate empty governance.rules | REQ-02 | ✅ |
| GOAL | SR-05 goal | Behavioral profile config-driven | REQ-03 | ✅ |
| GOAL | SR-05 goal | Naming standards runtime enforcement | REQ-05 | ✅ |
| RESEARCH | R-01 | Two separate configs, zero connection (Gap 1) | REQ-01 | ✅ |
| RESEARCH | R-02 | Governance evaluator wired but empty (Gap 2) | REQ-02 | ✅ |
| RESEARCH | R-03 | Static behavioral profile guardrails (Gap 3) | REQ-03 | ✅ |
| RESEARCH | R-04 | SR-05 never implemented (Gap 4) | REQ-04 | ✅ |
| RESEARCH | R-05 | WS-4 deferred work (Gap 5) | REQ-03 | ✅ |
| RESEARCH | R-06 | Phase 3 D-12/D-13 partial implementation (Gap 6) | REQ-02 | ✅ |

**Codebase findings verified:**
- `src/schema-kernel/hivemind-configs.schema.ts:301` — `governance: GovernanceConfigsSchema.default({ rules: [] })` ✅ (empty)
- `src/hooks/guards/tool-guard-hooks.ts:157-158` — governance branch conditional on `governance?.rules` ✅ (falsy today)
- `.hivemind/configs.json` — no `governance` field ✅ (confirmed)
- `src/routing/behavioral-profile/resolve-behavioral-profile.ts:64` — static `BehavioralProfiles[mode]` lookup ✅ (no config override)
- `.hivemind/governance/config.json` — populated with 7 agents, naming_standards, commands ✅ (unconnected)
- `src/features/governance-engine/config-reader.ts:83` — `HIVEMIND_GOVERNANCE_CONFIG_PATH` env var override ✅ (needs removal)

**Next:** `/hm-discuss-phase SR-05` — discuss-phase sẽ detect SPEC.md và focus vào implementation decisions (schema design, migration strategy, rule content).
